calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-03-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Diana Padilla. Arnold Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority and Defendant, Sandra Darden appeared in pro per. The case settled per stipulation of parties per the record. Trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SANDRA DARDEN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Off Calendar, first amended
complaint filed on 12/31/2002. (JJM/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
